html:
Exclusive to:

The Nightmarish Bird Whistle is a craftable Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Magic Tab, requires a Bird Whistle and two Dark Tatters to craft, and a Hogus Porkusator to prototype.

Using the Nightmarish Bird Whistle prevents the BFB from spawning naturally in the world. Once the Nightmarish Bird Whistle has been played, the BFB will only spawn in the future if it is called by the original Bird Whistle.

Tips

  • Using the Nightmarish Bird Whistle can be helpful to prevent the periodic interruptions and base evacuations that the natural spawning of the BFB can cause.
  • Note that this item will only affect future spawns; it will not cancel a naturally spawning BFB that is already currently descending.
  • Because the BFB can still be called using the Bird Whistle, Dung Piles will remain renewable, and the player will still have access to the Pinacle if they had not visited it before using the Nightmarish Bird Whistle.
  • As the Ancient Herald will only drop five Dark Tatters when it is defeated, the player may wish to remain in the Aporkalypse long enough to defeat it twice if they wish to have enough to craft both the Vortex Cloak and Nightmarish Bird Whistle.
Tools and WeaponsCraftable Items

Nightmarish Bird Whistle
"Strikes fear into even the biggest birds."

“This should scare off that big bird.”
–Wilson
“Seeya round big birdie. Or not.”
–Willow
“Birds not like it, makes scary sound!”
–Wolfgang
“It has a most haunting sound.”
–Wendy
“AVIAN ANXIETY INDUCER”
–WX-78
“One bird in particular does not seem to enjoy it.”
–Wickerbottom
“Bird repellant.”
–Woodie
“This should rid me of that giant pest.”
–Maxwell
“This model appears to deter the exceedingly large bird.”
–Wagstaff
“Calls öff the mighty bird beast.”
–Wigfrid
“The big birdie doesn't like the sounds it makes.”
–Webber
“Bye birdy birdy.”
–Walani
“Au revoir giant bird, no dinner for you!”
–Warly
“Fer chasin' off tha big feather'd beastie.”
–Woodlegs
“BIG BIRDIE LIKETH NOT ITS SONG”
–Wilba
“Scares Womp Tweeter”
–Wormwood
“This should make any giant birds steer clear.”
–Wheeler
The Nightmarish Bird Whistle is a craftable Item exclusive to the Hamlet DLC. It is found in the Magic Tab, requires a Bird Whistle and two Dark Tatters to craft, and a Hogus Porkusator to prototype.
Using the Nightmarish Bird Whistle prevents the BFB from spawning naturally in the world. Once the Nightmarish Bird Whistle has been played, the BFB will only spawn in the future if it is called by the original Bird Whistle.
Tips[edit | edit source]
Using the Nightmarish Bird Whistle can be helpful to prevent the periodic interruptions and base evacuations that the natural spawning of the BFB can cause.
Note that this item will only affect future spawns; it will not cancel a naturally spawning BFB that is already currently descending.
Because the BFB can still be called using the Bird Whistle, Dung Piles will remain renewable, and the player will still have access to the Pinacle if they had not visited it before using the Nightmarish Bird Whistle.
As the Ancient Herald will only drop five Dark Tatters when it is defeated, the player may wish to remain in the Aporkalypse long enough to defeat it twice if they wish to have enough to craft both the Vortex Cloak and Nightmarish Bird Whistle.

The '''Nightmarish Bird Whistle''' is a craftable [[Item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC. It is found in the [[Magic Tab]], requires a [[Bird Whistle]] and two [[Dark Tatters]] to craft, and a [[Hogus Porkusator]] to prototype.

Using the Nightmarish Bird Whistle prevents the [[BFB]] from spawning naturally in the world. Once the Nightmarish Bird Whistle has been played, the BFB will only spawn in the future if it is called by the original [[Bird Whistle]].

== {{Pic32|Prototype}} Tips ==
* Using the Nightmarish Bird Whistle can be helpful to prevent the periodic interruptions and base evacuations that the natural spawning of the BFB can cause.
* Note that this item will only affect future spawns; it will not cancel a naturally spawning BFB that is already currently descending.
* Because the BFB can still be called using the Bird Whistle, [[Dung Pile|Dung Piles]] will remain renewable, and the player will still have access to the [[Pinacle]] if they had not visited it before using the Nightmarish Bird Whistle.
* As the [[Ancient Herald]] will only drop five [[Dark Tatters]] when it is defeated, the player may wish to remain in the Aporkalypse long enough to defeat it twice if they wish to have enough to craft both the [[Vortex Cloak]] and Nightmarish Bird Whistle.
